title: Content sanitization and media validation hardening
description: Harden ammonia sanitization policy to match Mastodon's allowlist: p, br, a (href only), span, em, strong, del, blockquote, code, pre, ul, ol, li. Strip everything else. Media hardening: MIME sniffing (not just extension), dimension limits, EXIF stripping (via img crate or kamadak-exif), reject non-image types. Rate limiting on inbox endpoint (per-IP, token bucket). Webhook IP allowlisting option.
close_reason: Sanitization via ammonia (Mastodon-compatible allowlist), rate limiter module, 12 integration tests all passing
